case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. PABLO ROBERTO LOPEZ

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT LOPEZ, PABLO ROBERTO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-17-2018 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 55.00 - SERVED MAR-31-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LOPEZ, PABLO ROBERTO
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM COMMISSIONER FILED BY OPORTUN, INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-17-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-17-2018 BY PRO TEM DAVID LAVINE. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY JHONATTAN HERRADA, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-17-2018 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LOPEZ, PABLO ROBERTO $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,605.00, DEFENDANT DID NOT APPEAR. PLAINTIFF ESTABLISHED DEFENDANT'S LOAN DELINQUENCY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
